description: Extract structured fields from vendor invoices and billing documents

invoiceNumber.description: Unique invoice identifier found near the top of the document under 'Invoice No.', 'Invoice #', or 'Bill No.'.

invoiceDate.description: Date the invoice was issued, found under 'Invoice Date', 'Date', or 'Billing Date'. Format: DD/MM/YYYY or MM-DD-YYYY.

dueDate.description: Payment deadline date found under 'Due Date', 'Pay By', or 'Payment Due'. If absent, leave null.

vendorName.description: Legal name of the vendor or supplier issuing the invoice, typically the largest text at the top or found under 'From' or 'Billed By'.

vendorAddress.description: Complete address of the vendor including street, city, state, and PIN/ZIP code, found under the vendor name or 'From' section.

customerName.description: Name of the buyer or customer being billed, found under 'Bill To', 'Customer Name', or 'Sold To'.

subtotal.description: Total value of goods or services before tax, found under 'Subtotal' or 'Amount Before Tax'. Exclude currency symbols.

taxAmount.description: Total tax applied including GST, VAT, or any other tax, found under 'Tax', 'GST', or 'VAT'. Exclude currency symbols.

totalAmount.description: Final payable amount after all taxes and discounts, found under 'Total', 'Grand Total', or 'Amount Due'. Exclude currency symbols.

paymentTerms.description: Payment condition stated on the invoice such as 'Net 30', 'Immediate', or 'Due on Receipt', found under 'Payment Terms'.
